sys_script_fix.description:
This script only needs to be run on systems that upgraded from 2.2 to 2.5.
This fix script makes all of the updates to the Task Tables to enable shared documents on all previously created tasks. This script does not need to be run when upgrading a 2.5 or later system.
To validate, run 2 queries on x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance_list Query 1 -> Parent Task is Empty - this will provide the count of all Top Tasks Query 2 -> Parent Task is Empty - and Task Tree is NOT empty, this will provide the count of all Top Tasks where Task Tree was added. - The 2 counts should match
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker 2.5 - Sharing Files Fix Script
